We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-smart-way-to-build-a-budget-home-office","children":"The Smart Way to Build a Budget Home Office"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The worst home office advice targets people with unlimited budgets. The second-worst advice tells you to spend as little as possible on everything. The right approach is strategic: understand which elements have the highest ergonomic and productivity impact, spend proportionally more on those, and make smart trade-offs on the rest."}}],"$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21","$L22","$L23"]}],"$L24","$L25","$L26"]}],"$L27"]}]]}]
7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L28",null,{"children":["$","$29",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2a"}]}]
9:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This guide covers a complete home office setup under £500 — with priorities clearly explained."}}]
a:["$","h2","3",{"id":"priority-1-the-chair-150-200","children":"Priority 1: The Chair (£150–200)"}]
b:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Nothing has more impact on your daily work quality than what you sit in for eight hours. A poor chair causes chronic discomfort that accumulates over months and years. It is also the area with the worst quality-to-price ratio at the budget end of the market."}}]
c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The best budget option is the <strong>Hbada Ergonomic Office Chair (~£150)</strong>. Mesh back, lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and seat height. Not at the level of a Herman Miller, but significantly better than anything cheaper."}}]
d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you can find a used Steelcase or Herman Miller within budget, prioritise that over new budget chairs every time. Check Facebook Marketplace and office liquidation sales — companies upgrade office furniture regularly."}}]
e:["$","h2","7",{"id":"priority-2-monitor-150-200","children":"Priority 2: Monitor (£150–200)"}]
f:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A good monitor reduces eye strain, makes reading and writing more comfortable, and increases effective screen real estate. At minimum: 27 inches, 1440p resolution, IPS panel."}}]
10:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best value: LG 27MK600M (~£200)</strong>. IPS panel, 1440p, 75Hz, good colour accuracy. Everything a home office monitor needs without premium features you will not use."}}]
11:["$","h2","10",{"id":"priority-3-desk-60-100","children":"Priority 3: Desk (£60–100)"}]
12:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The desk is primarily a surface. For a budget setup, the <strong>IKEA LINNMON / ALEX combination (~£80)</strong> remains one of the best value options available: a large surface, integrated drawer storage, and solid legs."}}]
13:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The LINNMON is MDF-based and not the most premium material, but it is entirely adequate for home office use. If you want a step up, the <strong>IKEA KARLBY countertop on ALEX legs (~£150)</strong> uses real wood and feels substantially better."}}]
14:["$","h2","13",{"id":"priority-4-keyboard-and-mouse-50-80-combined","children":"Priority 4: Keyboard and Mouse (£50–80 combined)"}]
15:["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Keyboard</strong>: The <strong>Keychron C3 Pro (~£35)</strong> is an excellent wired mechanical keyboard. For wireless, the Keychron K2 (~£75) is worth the stretch."}}]
16:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Mouse</strong>: The <strong>Logitech M705 (~£35)</strong> offers wireless connectivity, a comfortable shape, and excellent tracking at a very reasonable price."}}]
17:["$","h2","16",{"id":"priority-5-lighting-30-50","children":"Priority 5: Lighting (£30–50)"}]
18:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A single overhead light is not enough for comfortable extended work. Add a desk lamp with adjustable colour temperature (~£25–40). For video calls, a simple LED ring light or panel (~£20–30) transforms your appearance on camera."}}]
19:["$","h2","18",{"id":"complete-budget-build-under-500","children":"Complete Budget Build: Under £500"}]
1a:["$","ul","19",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Chair: Hbada Ergonomic — £150"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Monitor: LG 27MK600M — £200"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Desk: IKEA LINNMON/ALEX — £80"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Keyboard: Keychron C3 Pro — £35"}}],["$","li","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Mouse: Logitech M705 — £35"}}],["$","li","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Total: approximately £500"}}]]}]
1b:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This covers the essentials. If you already own a desk, redirect that budget to the chair and monitor."}}]
1c:["$","h2","21",{"id":"what-to-skip-at-this-budget","children":"What to Skip at This Budget"}]
1d:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor arm</strong>: Useful, but a monitor with a good built-in stand suffices initially. Add one later (~£40 for a basic arm)."}}]
1e:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Premium mechanical keyboard</strong>: A good entry-level mechanical is fine. Upgrade when you have experienced the difference."}}]
1f:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Herman Miller new</strong>: Buy used if budget allows. Brand new is not necessary — these chairs last decades."}}]
20:["$","h2","25",{"id":"the-upgrade-path","children":"The Upgrade Path"}]
21:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Once you are earning from your home office and can reinvest:"}}]
22:["$","ol","27",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Chair upgrade</strong>: Herman Miller Aeron (used, ~£400–600) or Steelcase Leap V2"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor upgrade</strong>: 32-inch 4K with USB-C (~£450)"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor arm</strong>: Ergotron LX (~£120)"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Keyboard upgrade</strong>: Keychron Q2 Pro (~£170) or similar"}}]]}]
23:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For a deep dive on which gear has the most impact, read our <a href=\"/blog/best-desk-setup-for-productivity\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">complete desk setup guide</a>."}}]
